content.problemStatement:
Chef has a sequence of NNN integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2,\dots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč. He defines a function f(i,j)f(i, j)f(i,j) as follows:

f(i,j)=Ai+max(Ai,Ai+1)+max(Ai,Ai+1,Ai+2)+‚čĮ+max(Ai,Ai+1,‚Ä¶,Aj)f(i, j) = A_i + max(A_i, A_{i + 1}) + max(A_i, A_{i + 1}, A_{i + 2}) + \dots + max(A_i, A_{i + 1}, \dots, A_j)f(i,j)=Ai‚Äč+max(Ai‚Äč,Ai+1‚Äč)+max(Ai‚Äč,Ai+1‚Äč,Ai+2‚Äč)+‚čĮ+max(Ai‚Äč,Ai+1‚Äč,‚Ä¶,Aj‚Äč)

Chef tries to find the sum of f(i,j)f(i, j)f(i,j) over all (i,j)(i, j)(i,j) such that 1‚Č§i‚Č§j‚Č§N1 \leq i \leq j \leq N1‚Č§i‚Č§j‚Č§N (i.e‚ąĎi=1n‚ąĎj=inf(i,j))(i.e \sum\limits_{i=1}^n \sum\limits_{j=i}^nf(i, j))(i.ei=1‚ąĎn‚Äčj=i‚ąĎn‚Äčf(i,j)), but fails. Can you help him find the sum?

Since the sum can be very large, find it modulo (109+7)(10^9 + 7)(109+7).

**Note:** Since the size of the input and output is large, please use fast input-output methods.


Input Format

The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains an integer NNN.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.


Output Format
For each test case, print a single line containing one integer - the required sum i.e ‚ąĎi=1n‚ąĎj=inf(i,j)\sum\limits_{i=1}^n \sum\limits_{j=i}^nf(i, j)i=1‚ąĎn‚Äčj=i‚ąĎn‚Äčf(i,j) modulo (109+7)(10^9 + 7)(109+7).
constraints: Sum of NNN over all test cases does not exceed 10610^6106.
